---

Use this for public requests that help prioritize DevKit, SDK, MCP, and example work.

## Request Type

Choose one:

- SDK capability
- DevKit local runtime
- MCP server or governing proxy
- Example application
- Integration guide
- Policy or audit workflow
- Workload identity
- Other

## Problem Or Use Case

What are you trying to build, prove, or evaluate?

## Requested Change

Describe the capability, example, guide, or improvement you want.

## Alternatives Considered

Mention any workaround, related tool, or existing example you tried.

## Public Issue Safety Check

- [ ] I have removed secrets, tokens, customer data, private URLs, and sensitive logs from this issue.
